summary: UI Refinement testing completed successfully. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright UI tests passed. Mission Control page displays dark slate-900 header with CapyMatch logo, mode navigation, and live status strip. Priority alerts use left border accent with colored 'why' text. Athletes shown in scannable row layout (not card grid). Events show days-away number prominently. Program section shows compact stats.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing MOCKED athlete/intervention data
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Refinement iteration complete. Key changes verified: (1) Dark slate-900 header (rgb(15,23,42)) with CapyMatch logo + mode navigation, (2) Live status strip shows 'X ALERTS | Y ATHLETES MONITORING | Z EVENTS AHEAD', (3) Priority Alerts have left border accent (border-l-[3px]) and colored 'why' text (text-base font-semibold = 16px/600), (4) Live Feed shows compact ticker rows with timestamps, (5) MONITORING section uses row layout (divide-y) not cards, (6) Events show day count on left with 'days' label, (7) Program shows compact stats with grad year breakdown. QuickActions FAB has been removed (confirmed not present). All existing behaviors preserved: peek panel opens on alert/athlete click, Open Support Pod navigation works, grad year filter works, back navigation works.

mission_control_api: Response has all sections: priorityAlerts, recentChanges, athletesNeedingAttention, upcomingEvents, programSnapshot
Priority alerts have required fields (category, athlete_name, grad_year, why_this_surfaced, what_changed, badge_color, owner, pod_health)
Recent changes have fields for Live Feed (id, athleteName, description, hoursAgo, sentiment)
Athletes have fields for Monitoring rows (athlete_id, name, grad_year, position, category, momentum_score/trend, owner, pod_health)
Events have fields for Events Ahead (id, name, type, daysAway, location, athleteCount, expectedSchools, prepStatus)
Program snapshot has totalAthletes, needingAttention, positiveMomentum, upcomingEvents, byGradYear
Header stats data available (alertCount=4, athleteCount=12, eventCount=6)

header: CapyMatch logo visible with CM badge
6 mode navigation buttons present (Mission Control active)
Live status strip shows: 4 ALERTS | 12 ATHLETES MONITORING | 6 EVENTS AHEAD
monitoring: Row layout used (divide-y class, not card grid)
Each row has: momentum score, name, grad year, position, category badge, why text, pod health, owner
program: Compact stats: Athletes=25, Need attention=7, Positive momentum=13, Events ahead=6
interactions: Click priority alert -> peek panel opens
Click athlete row -> peek panel opens
Peek panel shows: Log Note, Message, Assign buttons
Open Support Pod navigates to support pod page
Grad year filter works (All Years selector)
